creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227083
"git diff" to update the port

- Update 1.04 -> 2.000
Changes: https://metacpan.org/release/ARISTOTLE/Class-Observable-2.000/source/Changes

- request maintainership as hcoyote seems to be absent for long
- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p3
pkg 1.17.1
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
